title: Episode 3 — Musk vs OpenAI (v16 + fireplace)
description: Same v16-juliet-fix debate, with a low fireplace ambient bed mixed under the voices at -22 dB. First trial of ElevenLabs-generated background audio. Listen back-to-back with the dry v16 episode and tell me which feels right.
